$index..validate: $index.matches(/^[0-9]+$/) && newData.hasChildren(['period', 'income_other', 'income_nong', 'income_fang', 'mortgage', 'insurance', 'built_in', 'furniture', 'mortgage_extra', 'expense_other', 'detail', 'category']) && newData.child('period').isString() && newData.child('period').val().length <= 20 && newData.child('income_other').isNumber() && newData.child('income_other').val() >= 0 && newData.child('income_nong').isNumber() && newData.child('income_nong').val() >= 0 && newData.child('income_fang').isNumber() && newData.child('income_fang').val() >= 0 && newData.child('mortgage').isNumber() && newData.child('mortgage').val() >= 0 && newData.child('insurance').isNumber() && newData.child('insurance').val() >= 0 && newData.child('built_in').isNumber() && newData.child('built_in').val() >= 0 && newData.child('furniture').isNumber() && newData.child('furniture').val() >= 0 && newData.child('mortgage_extra').isNumber() && newData.child('mortgage_extra').val() >= 0 && newData.child('expense_other').isNumber() && newData.child('expense_other').val() >= 0 && newData.child('detail').isString() && newData.child('detail').val().length <= 5000 && newData.child('category').isString() && newData.child('category').val().length <= 80
